title: 1x 250ml Wood Glue - Strong Fast-Acting Multi-Purpose Waterproof Adhesive for Fabric, Metal, Wood, Rubber, Shoe Repair - by Blackspur
features: This water resistant PVA wood glue comes with an anti-clog applicator & will dry in approximately 10 minutes once applied.
Extra strong & transparent, it is suitable for use on wood, paper, cork, textiles & more.
It can also be used as an internal filler when mixed with wood shavings & is suitable for indoor & outdoor use.
With a dedicated Customer Service Team committed to providing peace of mind from our door to yours.
